content.speakerText: I’ve paid with my phone. Can you check if the booking is confirmed?
content.speakerTextCn: 我用手机支付了，能帮我确认一下预订是否成功吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, your payment went through. Your tickets are confirmed and sent to your email.
All set! You’re all confirmed — just show your phone at the gate.
Confirmed! You’ll see a digital ticket on your screen — no need for paper.
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确告知支付和预订状态
是否使用了现代支付相关词汇（digital ticket, phone, email）
是否提供清晰的下一步指引（如出示手机）
